channel.title: Caugia Intelligence — GTM diagnostics & revenue architecture
channel.description: Deep-dive articles on GTM diagnostics, revenue leakage, and the GRIP framework for B2B SaaS.

item.title: AI in GTM: Why Most SaaS Teams Buy the Wrong Tools First | Caugia
item.description: AI agents and automation can accelerate GTM performance. But only if applied to the right constraint. Without a diagnostic, most teams automate the wrong part of the system.

item.title: Your Brand Is Invisible to AI. Here's the Data. | Caugia Intelligence
item.description: 40% of B2B buyers research with AI before Google. If ChatGPT doesn't mention your brand, you don't exist for a growing segment of buyers. Here's what the data shows — and what to do about it.

item.title: Alignment and Governance Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Why Teams Drift Apart | Caugia
item.description: Alignment is not about agreement. It is about shared operating rhythm, clear accountability, and decision governance that keeps the GTM system coherent as it scales.

item.title: GTM Unit Economics for CFOs: When Growth Costs More Than It Should | Caugia
item.description: Your GTM system is not just a revenue engine. It is a cost structure. For CFOs evaluating burn efficiency, CAC payback, and Rule of 40 compliance, the question is not whether growth is happening but whether it is economically sound.

item.title: Marketing's Role in Revenue Architecture: A CMO Diagnostic | Caugia
item.description: Marketing is under pressure to prove revenue impact. But the traditional marketing metrics — MQLs, traffic, brand awareness — do not connect to the revenue system. Here is how CMOs should diagnose marketing's structural role in GTM.

item.title: What Your Board Actually Wants to See: GTM Metrics That Drive Decisions | Caugia
item.description: Board decks full of pipeline charts and MQL counts do not drive decisions. This covers the metrics board members and investors actually use to evaluate GTM health and growth quality.

item.title: Customer Success Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Why Retention Teams Fail at Growth | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS CS teams are structured to prevent churn, not to drive expansion. This diagnostic framework reveals whether your post-sale system compounds revenue or merely preserves it.

item.title: Data and Insights Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: When Dashboards Replace Decisions | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS companies have dashboards. Few have insights. Data and Insights diagnoses whether your measurement system drives decisions or just displays numbers.

item.title: Demand Generation Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Why Pipeline Volume Masks Pipeline Problems | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS demand generation teams optimize for volume. But pipeline that does not convert is not pipeline — it is noise. Here is how to diagnose whether your demand engine creates revenue or just activity.

item.title: Sales Enablement Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Why Your Team Knows the Strategy but Cannot Execute It | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS companies have a strategy. Most teams cannot execute it consistently. The gap between strategy and execution is almost always an enablement failure. Here is how to diagnose it.

item.title: The GRIP Framework: A GTM Diagnostic Model for B2B SaaS Revenue Systems | Caugia
item.description: GRIP is Caugia's diagnostic framework for evaluating B2B SaaS revenue systems across 12 GTM pillars and 4 dimensions to identify structural constraints and revenue leakage.

item.title: GTM Diagnostics vs. Traditional Consulting: Why the Model Is Changing | Caugia
item.description: Traditional GTM consulting is slow, expensive, and subjective. Deterministic diagnostics encode expert methodology into scoring engines. Here is what changes and what stays the same.

item.title: The GTM Strategy Framework for B2B SaaS: From Founder-Led to System-Led Growth | Caugia
item.description: Most GTM strategies fail because they optimize channels instead of systems. This framework shows how to diagnose where your revenue architecture breaks and how to fix it.

item.title: GTM Strategy and Leadership Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Is Direction Clear? | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS companies have a strategy document. Few have a strategy that the entire team executes against. Here is how to diagnose whether your GTM direction is clear or just documented.

item.title: Market Intelligence Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Do You Actually Know Your Market? | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS companies have an ICP document. Few have validated it against revenue data. Market intelligence is the difference between guessing and knowing who to target, why they buy, and when they switch.

item.title: NRR and Expansion Revenue: The Growth Engine Most B2B SaaS Teams Underinvest In | Caugia
item.description: At scale, Net Revenue Retention determines whether your SaaS company compounds or stalls. This playbook covers the mechanics of expansion revenue and why most CS teams are structured to fail at it.

item.title: Pricing and Packaging Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Where Monetization Breaks Your GTM | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS pricing is set once and forgotten. But pricing misalignment silently destroys win rates, NRR, and expansion. Here is how to diagnose whether your pricing supports or suppresses your GTM system.

item.title: Product Marketing Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: When Positioning Fails to Land | Caugia
item.description: Product Marketing is the bridge between product capability and market value. When that bridge is weak, Sales improvises, messaging fragments, and competitive deals are lost before they start.

item.title: Product Readiness Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: The Gap Between What Sales Promises and Product Delivers | Caugia
item.description: Product Readiness measures the gap between what Sales promises and what Product delivers. When the gap is wide, implementation fails, churn rises, and the GTM system carries weight it should not.

item.title: Revenue Leakage in B2B SaaS: Where Your ARR Actually Disappears | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS companies lose 15 to 30 percent of potential ARR to structural leakage across pipeline, conversion, pricing, and expansion. Here is how to find it and quantify it.

item.title: Revenue Operations for B2B SaaS: When Your Infrastructure Becomes the Constraint | Caugia
item.description: RevOps is supposed to remove friction from your GTM system. In most B2B SaaS companies, it adds complexity instead. Here is how to diagnose whether your operational infrastructure is enabling growth or suppressing it.

item.title: Revenue Architecture for SaaS: Why Your GTM System Is Heavier Than It Should Be | Caugia
item.description: Revenue architecture is the structural design of how a SaaS company converts market opportunity into recurring revenue. Most teams never make it explicit. Here is how to think about it.

item.title: Sales Execution Diagnostics for B2B SaaS: Why Deals Stall and Win Rates Vary | Caugia
item.description: Most B2B SaaS sales teams are hero-dependent. A few top performers carry the number while the rest underperform. This diagnostic reveals whether your sales system produces consistent outcomes or relies on individual talent.

item.title: The Hidden Cost of GTM Misalignment: How Series B Companies Leak 15-30% of ARR | Caugia Intelligence
item.description: Series B is where GTM debt becomes visible. Learn how churn, discount erosion, pipeline waste, and capacity underutilization combine to leak 15-30% of ARR.

item.title: GTM Due Diligence for Investors: What VCs Miss in Revenue System Assessment | Caugia
item.description: Most VC due diligence evaluates product, market, and team. GTM system health is rarely assessed with the same rigor. Here is why that is a blind spot and how to diagnose GTM architecture before writing a check.

item.title: What Is a GTM Diagnostic? A Structured Assessment of B2B SaaS Revenue Systems | Caugia
item.description: A GTM diagnostic is a structured, scored evaluation of a B2B SaaS revenue system across strategy, resources, execution, and performance. Here is what it is, how it works, and why it replaces the discovery phase of traditional consulting.

item.title: Why Every B2B SaaS Company Needs a GTM Operating System | Caugia Intelligence
item.description: The GTM stack is fragmented across 15+ tools with zero governance. Learn why you need a GTM Operating System that governs the tools, not more tools.

item.title: Why GTM Partners Need Diagnostic Infrastructure, Not Just Referral Links | Caugia
item.description: The best GTM partners don't just refer clients — they diagnose before they advise. Here's why diagnostic infrastructure is becoming the competitive advantage for consultants, agencies, and fractional operators.
